title: A Tale of Five Women
director: Romolo Marcellini, Emil E. Reinert, Wolfgang Staudte
writer: Maurice J. Wilson, Alexander Paal, Jacques Companéez
actors: Bonar Colleano, Lana Morris, Barbara Kelly
plot: 1951. Drama. Stars, Bonar Colleano, Barbara Kelly, Eva Bartok & Gina Lollobrigida. When an Englishman leaves America to enlist in the RAF, his gruelling combat experiences result in a loss of memory.
country: United Kingdom, Italy, West Germany, France, Austria
